messages: Hi Omar, can i view this apartment before payment please? If we can arrange today if possible. I want to rent for a month or so
No, you can give me time to come?
11 pm right?
Can we make it earlier please?
Can we go now?
Nigerian
No
Okay
If i take uber now it will take 20 minutes
I will be on my way now
Almost there, i am 5mins away
I have seen her
I made the reservation but i hope you can give me feedback on construction before the free cancellation date, march 25. Thank you.
No problem for certificate. We do not have American passports
Hi Omar. Is it possible to extend the free cancellation date. As you know travel plans these days are hard to confirm due to whats going on in the region. I would greatly appreciate it.
Can you give me an extra week please. By Monday 23rd.
Thank you
Sorry i miscalculated the dates its already set for march 25th. Can you make its march 28th please.
Thanks
Hi Omar
Will send you the passports today

Thanks Omar
I want to just make sure that there will be enough clean towels for the showers and for hands. 
We will need bedding that is suitable for the cold nights please. 
Well equipped clean kitchen 
No construction happening in the building
Hi Omar actually im arriving at 6am
If at all possible to accomodate me early that would be great
No worries
Alteration request received
Do you have an iron and ironnign board?
Hi trying to get into the apt. Gate says they dont have my info yet
Also i dont see the entry code

كيفك استاذ عمر 
هل يوجد خصم اضافي
نعم
كم غرفه
سويلي خصم طيب
غرفة المربية مكيف ولا مروحة
هل يوجد شقة 4 غرف
السرير الاضافي بيكون مريح ؟

Hi Omer,
We’re visiting Egypt for the first time 🥰 and we’d love to stay at your place.

Just to let you know, there are four of us.
Three girls will arrive earlier, and the last one will join us around January 5 or 6.

Hi omar 
Yes thank you everything is good
Please my hairstylist is coming I need your permission to let him in only for one hour
As all salons are already closed early due the Christmas as they said
He already outside waiting for your permission

Hello Omar
Please I need late check out from 11 to 1 pm
How do I pay the extra cost
Where i can find the request
Already Done ✔️
